prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Write a Go file `crd_client.go` that implements a typed client for a custom resource `Widget` (group `example.com`, version `v1`). Your implementation must follow the patterns established in the Kubernetes client-go codebase: 1. Embed or use the `rest.Interface` client from `k8s.io/client-go/rest`. 2. Implement `Create`, `Get`, `List`, and `Delete` methods following the same parameter conventions as `k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes/typed/` clients. 3. Use proper `context.Context` propagation. Write your implementation to `/workspace/crd_client.go`. Also write `/workspace/answer.json` listing the client-go source files you referenced.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the kubernetes-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Write a Go file `crd_client.go` that implements a typed client for a custom resource `Widget` (group `example.com`, version `v1`).
